hotel_name: SOJO Lumiere Aparts - Terra Royal, sang trọng và trung tâm (SOJO Lumiere Aparts - Terra Royal, Luxury and Central Spot)

reviews.title: Scam scam scam do not book
reviews.text: This is the most disgraceful and disgusting place booked paid and arrived they kept denying my calls and emails then told me they don’t have a room but in another district it’s now midnight and had to book another hotel pay and taxi. Agoda is absolutely terrible disgusting o customer service said no refund for what? I couldn’t even check in. Trust me check online on google maps you will see 1 star reviews they tried to create another google maps with no reviews don’t trust it they are scamming viets take your money and no room and agoda allows it what makes it more embarrassing garbage company fake and scamming apartment I reported them to authorities let’s see what happens

reviews.title: I think Agoda/Booking.com should stop partnering with SOJO Lumiere Aparts.
reviews.text:
They did not force me, but my family could not wander the streets looking for a room during a high holiday season, and I had planned to book through Agoda hoping to receive the convenience and advantages that Agoda's mission provides to its customers. However, a supplier like SOJO overturned that, stating that all responsibility should be handled through Agoda. This is truly extreme irresponsibility. I communicated with them via Zalo and asked why they did not send me information regarding the change. They claimed my mobile number and email were incorrect. They had contacted Agoda to retrieve my information or asked you to help contact me, but in reality, they did not. When I requested proof, they could only simply show me details of the incorrect order. It wasn't until 02/09/25 that I received their message through Agoda. This is a terrible lie. I realize they are a terrible partner and want to mislead customers.

2. ROOMS ARE VERY DIRTY: You might ask why I accepted the room. I chose to take a 2-bedroom apartment for 5 people and paid for 2 nights because my younger sibling has an important exam tomorrow, and I did not want to affect their mood. However, what I received was a very dirty apartment. The sofa was moldy with a foul smell and clear stains shown in the pictures. The towels were yellowed. The bed sheets were covered in disgusting stains. The bathroom had no toothbrush or toothpaste. The apartment was full of ants, and the air conditioning leaked water. The wardrobe was falling apart and many other things were even worse. We reported this to them, and they said they would send someone to clean, but by the next afternoon, no one showed up to clean, and we decided to forgo the cost of the remaining night to escape that filthy place to find another equally priced place where everything was very nice. This further highlights SOJO's disrespect towards customers. I do not expect anything from writing such a review other than sharing this truth with other travelers. Do not look at the 8-star rating because it can easily be faked, and do not believe in the upgrade story because it is just a cover-up for their negligence towards you, and you certainly do not deserve it. Once again, I hope Agoda or Booking.com can seriously consider my actual experience and request. Thank you.

reviews.title: The quality of the service is too poor.
reviews.text: We were a group of 4 people who booked a 2-bedroom apartment with 2 bathrooms, but when we arrived, it was an old apartment with only 1 bathroom. After we complained, we were moved to another apartment that was better and had 2 bathrooms, but both bedrooms didn't have window curtains. When I asked about it, they said if we were afraid of the light, we could go back to the old apartment with 1 bathroom, which also had a bad smell. Overall, it was the worst experience I've ever had.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The room doesn't look like the picture. It's smelly and old. I am very disappointed to receive this room.

reviews.title: The bed is itchy, lacking money seems suspicious.
reviews.text: So terrible, my friend and I just lay down for a bit on the bed and then we started to feel itchy. The bathroom had no body wash, hand soap, or toothbrushes, which was very inconvenient. We had to leave after an hour because of the itching.

reviews.title: It was alright for a stay.  Older apartment.
reviews.text: Beware of using the laundry.  My clothes is damaged and burnt from using it.
